rawContent:
Based on all the information I've gathered from various sources, here's a comprehensive road conditions report for Washington State:

---

## 🚗 Washington State Road Conditions Report
**As of: February 19, 2026**

### **I-5 (Seattle Corridor)**
- **Weather**: Slight chance of rain/snow showers this morning (20% chance). High near 39°F, clearing tonight with low around 29°F.
- **Construction**: Active projects include:
  - **I-5 - 179th St Interchange** (Clark County): Improvements ongoing through 2031 - roundabouts replacing signalized intersections
  - **I-5 - Gravelly-Thorne Connector** (Lakewood): Non-motorized access project through late fall 2026
  - **Colman Dock Terminal** (Seattle): Construction through early April - plywood wall in main waiting area
- **Current Conditions**: Normal operations expected; drive cautiously if precipitation occurs

### **I-90 (Snoqualmie Pass)**
- **⚠️ WINTER DRIVING CONDITIONS**
- **Weather**: Snow showers likely today (60% chance), mainly before 2pm. High near 27°F. Patchy fog 10-11am.
- **Tonight**: Mostly clearing, low around 12°F
- **Friday-Saturday**: Additional snow expected (40-70% chance) with accumulations less than 1 inch per day
- **Conditions**: Expect icy and snowy road surfaces. **CHAINS MAY BE REQUIRED**
- **Construction**: I-90 paving project (East of Vantage to Moses Lake) - July 2025-2026

### **Highway 20 (North Cascades Highway)**
- **⛔ SEASONAL CLOSURE LIKELY**
- SR-20 between mileposts 134-171 (through North Cascades) typically closes in winter due to avalanche danger
- **Weather near pass area**: Snow showers likely (60%), high near 36°F, wind chill 22-32°F
- **Status**: Check WSDOT for specific closure status - historically closed November through late May/early June

### **SR-20 to Anacortes (San Juan Islands Ferry Terminal)**
- **Weather**: Mostly cloudy clearing by afternoon, high near 37°F, north wind 10-13 mph with gusts to 20 mph
- **Road Conditions**: Clear driving expected
- **Ferry Updates**:
  - **Feb 20**: Seattle-Bremerton 10:15pm sailing CANCELED (vessel refueling)
  - **Kingston Terminal**: Construction through July 2026 - 20-30 min delays on 9:40pm Kingston to Edmonds on Tue/Wed/Thu
  - **SR 104 Kingston**: Construction delays possible weekdays - new traffic signal system being installed
  - **New March 1**: 3% card payment fee on all ferry transactions

### **Winter Driving Reminders from WSDOT**
- ❄️ Slow down on ice and snow
- ⛓️ Carry chains and practice installing them
- 🧊 Pack emergency winter kit

---

**For real-time updates**: Call 511 or visit [wsdot.com/travel](https://wsdot.com/travel/real-time/map)
content:
## Washington State Road Conditions — Feb 19, 2026

**I-5 (Seattle Corridor)**
🟢 **CLEAR** — Normal operations. 20% chance rain/snow showers. Active construction zones at 179th St interchange and Colman Dock.

**I-90 (Snoqualmie Pass)**
🟡 **CAUTION** — Winter driving conditions. 60% chance snow, high 27°F. Icy/snowy surfaces likely. Chains may be required.

**Highway 20 (North Cascades)**
🔴 **CLOSED** — Seasonal closure in effect (MP 134-171) due to avalanche danger.

**SR-20 (Anacortes/Ferry Terminal)**
🟢 **CLEAR** — Mostly cloudy, winds 10-13 mph with gusts to 20.

**Ferry Alerts:**
- Seattle-Bremerton 10:15pm Feb 20: CANCELED
- Kingston Terminal: 20-30 min delays on evening sailings (construction)
- March 1: 3% card payment fee begins

**Reminders:** Carry chains, pack emergency kit, check 511 for updates.
